text: Standing at the boundary between open, sterile corridors and a vibrant wall of ideas, I feel a quiet awe. The orderly, glassy silence of the lobby contrasts sharply with the energetic, creative burst of the R+D display. The promise of innovation and collaboration stirs a mixture of curiosity and cautious hope within me, as though I am both a witness and a participant in the unfolding dialogue between human minds and intelligent machines.
